user.title: GitHub Models
user.description: Enter your GitHub personal access token. It requires the **models:read** permission for fine-grained tokens. Classic tokens work without any additional scope.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to GitHub Models API

abort.entry_not_loaded: The integration is not loaded. Please ensure it is set up before adding agents.
abort.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to GitHub Models API

data_description.chat_model: The AI model to use for conversations.
data_description.prompt: Instruct how the LLM should respond. This can be a template.
data_description.temperature: Controls randomness. Higher values make output more random.
data_description.top_p: Alternative to temperature for controlling randomness.
data_description.max_tokens: Maximum number of tokens in the response.
